title: Owner-Harm: A Missing Threat Model for AI Agent Safety
summary: Existing AI agent safety benchmarks focus on generic criminal harm (cybercrime, harassment, weapon synthesis), leaving a systematic blind spot for a distinct and commercially consequential threat category: agents harming their own deploy...
